title: My First Website
excerpt: The beginning of my web development journey. Created on my birthday, August 23, 2021 — a simple website that represents where it all started.

title: Commit Like a Pro
excerpt: Stop writing bad commit messages. A complete conventional commits guide — the standard used by Angular, Vue, Electron, and thousands of open source projects.

title: Dear Brain,
excerpt: An open letter to the part of me that's apparently nocturnal, chaotic, and deeply committed to my suffering. 2 AM is not a reflection session. It's sabotage.
